scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @real-demo/shared build && pnpm --filter @real-demo/ui build && pnpm --filter @real-demo/sdk build
scripts.generate-sdk: pnpm --filter @real-demo/shared build && pnpm --filter @real-demo/server prisma:generate && pnpm openapi && pnpm --filter @real-demo/sdk generate-sdk
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm knip && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.clean: turbo clean && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/.react-router apps/*/.turbo apps/server/openapi packages/*/dist packages/*/.turbo packages/ui/storybook-static
scripts.docker-run: if [ -z "$REAL_DEMO_ENCRYPTION_KEY" ]; then echo 'REAL_DEMO_ENCRYPTION_KEY is required. Generate one with: openssl rand -base64 32' >&2; exit 1; fi; docker run --rm -p 13000:13000 --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env NODE_ENV=production --env PORT=13000 --env APP_BASE_PATH=${APP_BASE_PATH:-/} --env APP_RUNTIME_API_BASE_URL=${APP_RUNTIME_API_BASE_URL:-} --env DATABASE_URL=mysql://app:app@host.docker.internal:13306/real_demo --env REDIS_URL=redis://host.docker.internal:16379 --env CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:13000 --env LOG_LEVEL=info --env SWAGGER_ENABLED=true --env TRUST_PROXY=${TRUST_PROXY:-false} --env REAL_DEMO_ENCRYPTION_KEY="$REAL_DEMO_ENCRYPTION_KEY" real-demo
